summary: Plan-only inventory assessment: #88442 and #88709 are quarantined to central security handling because their hydrated PR content includes security-sensitive signals. No merge recommendations because none of the remaining open PRs has complete merge preflight proof including current mergeability and clean Codex /review evidence. One narrow non-security repair path remains concrete for #88550; #88551 and #88726 need maintainer judgment because of auth-provider scope, broad deltas, failed checks, or incomplete review/comment preflight.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive agent safety and credential-access regression content must be quarantined to central security handling.
Small focused PR with concrete failing checks and unresolved bot-review preflight; repair is appropriate before merge.
Concrete bounded repair artifact can be handed to the executor without closing or replacing the contributor PR.
Auth-provider behavior change appears plausible and checks pass, but merge cannot be recommended without complete mergeability, comments, and Codex /review preflight.
Inline API key and credential-handling changes are security-sensitive and must be quarantined to central security handling.
Broad cross-extension feature PR with failed checks, waiting-on-author state, and unrelated-looking file drift is not safe for an automated repair or merge recommendation.

needs_human: #88551: auth-provider behavior change has passing checks but lacks hydrated comments, current mergeability, and Codex /review proof.
#88726: broad cross-extension/docs feature PR has failed checks, waiting-on-author state, and unrelated-looking file drift.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #88550 on the contributor branch before any merge attempt. Keep the scope to disabling WebSocket compression for Codex Supervisor app-server clients and the existing Unix socket handshake regression test, then re-run failed checks and hydrate/address the Codex review bot comment.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for Clownfish cluster live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-002.

Source PR: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88550
Contributor credit: imwyvern / sakaenyeniceri5

Scope:
- Keep the Codex Supervisor WebSocket compression fix narrow.
- Preserve the Unix socket handshake regression test.
- Resolve failing Real behavior proof, check-test-types, check-dependencies, and checks-node-agentic-agents-core.
- Hydrate and address the Codex review bot comment before merge preflight.

Validation:
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex-supervisor/src/supervisor.test.ts
- pnpm build
- npm run validate
- Codex /review clean before merge recommendation
validation_commands: rerun GitHub checks: Real behavior proof, check-test-types, check-dependencies, checks-node-agentic-agents-core
hydrate Codex review bot findings and rerun Codex /review before merge preflight
credit_notes: Credit PR author imwyvern and commit author sakaenyeniceri5 in any replacement or repair summary.
needs_human: #88551: auth-provider behavior change has passing checks but lacks hydrated comments, current mergeability, and Codex /review proof.
#88726: broad cross-extension/docs feature PR has failed checks, waiting-on-author state, and unrelated-looking file drift.
